subject: Mathematics
question_text: Write whether the following statements are True or False. Justify your answer. (i) A binomial can have atmost two terms (ii) Every polynomial is a binomial (iii) A binomial may have degree 5 (iv) Zero of a polynomial is always 0 (v) A polynomial cannot have more than one zero (vi) The degree of the sum of two polynomials each of degree 5 is always 5.
